title: Zuvo No-Drill Shower Caddy with Suction Cups - Adhesive-Free Bathroom Shelf for Shampoo, Soap, Toiletries—Space-Saving Organiser (White)
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: 𝗡𝗼-𝗗𝗿𝗶𝗹𝗹 𝗦𝗵𝗼𝘄𝗲𝗿 𝗖𝗮𝗱𝗱𝘆 𝘄𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝗦𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗖𝘂𝗽𝘀: Installs easily without tools, screws, or adhesives, offering damage-free bathroom storage.
𝗦𝘁𝗿𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗦𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗦𝗲𝗰𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗛𝗼𝗹𝗱: Features heavy-duty suction cups that provide a firm grip on smooth surfaces, keeping toiletries secure and organised.
𝗦𝗽𝗮𝗰𝗲-𝗦𝗮𝘃𝗶𝗻𝗴 & 𝗖𝗹𝘂𝘁𝘁𝗲𝗿-𝗙𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗗𝗲𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻: Perfect for small bathrooms, this shower shelf keeps shampoo, soap, and accessories neatly stored.
𝗗𝘂𝗿𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲 & 𝗪𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗼𝗳 𝗕𝘂𝗶𝗹𝗱: Made from high-quality, rustproof plastic, this bathroom caddy ensures long-lasting use in wet conditions.
𝗘𝗮𝘀𝘆 𝘁𝗼 𝗜𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗹𝗹 & 𝗥𝗲𝗽𝗼𝘀𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: Reusable suction cups allow for quick removal & repositioning, making it an ideal option for renters & homeowners.
description: Product Description ABOUT PRODUCT Clean and dry the smooth and non-porous wall first, peel off the clear film from the vacuum suction cup. Put the suction shower hook on the wall and press the button to squeeze out the air. Durable & heavy duty Easy install BATHROOM CADDY WITH SUCTION Bathroom shower organizer suction Our suction cup shower rack organizer is made of durable and ABS material. These features make our suction shower basket durable, maximum load up to 22 lbs. Durable materials with the principle of octopus bionics make the shower suction hooks can hold up to 11 LBs, suction cup and wall to break the sealed space. Easy to use Plastic material Versatile use QUICK DRY & DRAIN DESIGN This shower caddy suction cup uses 6°design and there are convex groove at the bottom, which can eliminate excess water. EASY INSTALLATION It is easy to install. No drills, no tools, just buckle the shower basket on hooks, press the suction cup on the wall to finish installation. REUSABLE & SAVE SPACE Suction of the bathroom shower organizer are reusable. Use a thin card to remove them and they can be used after washing.
